creator: pjdelport@gmail.com
text:
(Maintainer CC'd.)

Announcement: http://www.selenic.com/pipermail/mercurial/2007-October/015150.html

Highlights:

 * New extensions:  alias, children, imerge, interhg, record
 * hgweb:  support for Atom feeds
 * convert extension:  support for Subversion and Darcs
